Name: ID
Description: Primary key

Name: AmountDC
Description: Amount in the default currency of the company

Name: AmountFC
Description: Amount in the currency of the transaction

Name: CostCenter
Description: Reference to Cost center

Name: CostCenterDescription
Description: Description of CostCenter

Name: CostUnit
Description: Reference to Cost unit

Name: CostUnitDescription
Description: Description of CostUnit

Name: Created
Description: Creation date

Name: Creator
Description: User ID of creator

Name: CreatorFullName
Description: Name of creator

Name: CustomField
Description: Custom field endpoint. Provided only for the Exact Online Premium users.

Name: Description
Description: Description of the purchase order line

Name: Discount
Description: Discount in percentage for item

Name: Division
Description: Division code

Name: Expense
Description: Expense related to the Work Breakdown Structure of the selected project. Only available with a professional service license

Name: ExpenseDescription
Description: Description of expense. Only available with a professional service license

Name: From
Description: The date which the purchase order line starts

Name: InStock
Description: The current stock level of items shown in stock unit. The information is displayed only for items with the stock property selected.

Name: InvoicedQuantity
Description: Quantity of item that has been invoiced

Name: IsBatchNumberItem
Description: Indicates that an Item is an batch item

Name: IsSerialNumberItem
Description: Indicates that an Item is an serial item

Name: Item
Description: Reference to the item for purchase order

Name: ItemBarcode
Description: Barcode of the item (numeric string)

Name: ItemBarcodeAdditional
Description: This is the barcode for the unit other than standard unit of the item. Only supported by the Premium for Wholesale & Distribution and Manufacturing

Name: ItemCode
Description: Item code

Name: ItemDescription
Description: Description of item

Name: ItemDivisable
Description: Indicates if fractional quantities of the item can be used, for example quantity = 0.4

Name: LineNumber
Description: Line number

Name: Modified
Description: Last modified date

Name: Modifier
Description: User ID of modifier

Name: ModifierFullName
Description: Name of modifier

Name: NetPrice
Description: The net price is the unit price (VAT code taken into account) with any discount applied

Name: Notes
Description: Notes

Name: Project
Description: Reference to project. Only available with a professional service license

Name: ProjectCode
Description: Project code. Only available with a professional service license

Name: ProjectDescription
Description: Description of the project. Only available with a professional service license

Name: ProjectedStock
Description: The current stock level + the planned quantity to be received - the planned quantity to deliver shown in stock unit.

Name: PurchaseOrderID
Description: Identifies the purchase order. All the lines of a purchase order have the same PurchaseOrderID

Name: Quantity
Description: Quantity in item units

Name: QuantityInPurchaseUnits
Description: Quantity in purchase units. Use this field when creating a purchase order

Name: Rebill
Description: Indicates whether the purchase order line needs to be rebilled. Only available with a professional service license

Name: ReceiptDate
Description: Date the goods are expected to be received

Name: ReceivedQuantity
Description: Quantity of goods received

Name: SalesOrder
Description: Sales order that is linked to a back to back sales order in purchase order. Show NULL if more than one sales order is linked to the purchase order line.

Name: SalesOrderLine
Description: Sales order line of the sales order that Is linked to a back to back sales order in purchase order. Show NULL if more than one sales order is linked to the purchase order line.

Name: SalesOrderLineNumber
Description: Number of the sales order line. Show NULL if more than one sales order is linked to the purchase order line.

Name: SalesOrderNumber
Description: Number of the sales order. Show NULL if more than one sales order is linked to the purchase order line.

Name: ShopOrder
Description: Obsolete. Please use "ShopOrderMaterialPlans" or "ShopOrderRoutingStepPlans" property.

Name: ShopOrderMaterialPlan
Description: Obsolete. Please use "ShopOrderMaterialPlans" property.

Name: ShopOrderMaterialPlanLineNumber
Description: Obsolete. Please use "ShopOrderMaterialPlans" property.

Name: ShopOrderMaterialPlans
Description: Collection of Shop order Material plans

Name: ShopOrderNumber
Description: Obsolete. Please use "ShopOrderMaterialPlans" or "ShopOrderRoutingStepPlans" property.

Name: ShopOrderRoutingStepPlan
Description: Obsolete. Please use "ShopOrderRoutingStepPlans" property.

Name: ShopOrderRoutingStepPlanLineNumber
Description: Obsolete. Please use "ShopOrderRoutingStepPlans" property.

Name: ShopOrderRoutingStepPlans
Description: Collection of Shop order Routing step plans

Name: SupplierItemCode
Description: Code the supplier uses for this item

Name: SupplierItemCopyRemarks
Description: Indicate if the notes content should be copied from SupplierItem's remarks. The default follows the CopyRemarks value from SupplierItem. Values: 0 = Do not copy remark, 1 = Copy remark

Name: To
Description: The date which the purchase order line ends

Name: Unit
Description: Code of item unit

Name: UnitDescription
Description: Description of unit

Name: UnitPrice
Description: Item price per purchase unit

Name: VATAmount
Description: Amount of VAT charges calculated from total amount and vat percentage

Name: VATCode
Description: The VAT code used when the invoice was registered

Name: VATDescription
Description: Description of vat code

Name: VATPercentage
Description: The VAT percentage of the VAT code. This is the percentage at the moment the invoice is created. It's also used by the default calculation of VAT amounts and VAT base amounts
